summary: Iteration 65: Tested Enhanced Operations Assistant Bot features. All 16 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI verified: larger window (520x600px), minimize button with 'Chat minimized' label, reset conversation button, 6 quick action buttons, natural language understanding, and comprehensive order analysis with 8 checks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 65 tested Enhanced Operations Assistant Bot features. All features working correctly: 1) GET /api/bot/comprehensive-order/{order_id} returns full analysis with 8 checks (customer_details, tracking_id, serial_numbers, sku_mapping, pricing_gst, sales_invoice, dispatch_entry, payment_reconciliation). 2) GET /api/bot/orders-missing-invoices returns orders without invoice_url with count and order details. 3) POST /api/bot/chat parses natural language intents (find_order, fix_invoices, status, stuck_orders, production, help). 4) Frontend UI: window size 520x600px, minimize button shows 'Chat minimized' label, reset button clears messages, 6 quick action buttons (Find Order, Status, Stuck Orders, Missing Invoices, Missing Data, Production), natural language input works.

comprehensive_order_endpoint.details: GET /api/bot/comprehensive-order/{order_id} returns order_id, found, source, checks (8 items), raw_order, summary

comprehensive_order_8_checks.details: All 8 checks present: customer_details, tracking_id, serial_numbers, sku_mapping, pricing_gst, sales_invoice, dispatch_entry, payment_reconciliation

orders_missing_invoices_endpoint.details: GET /api/bot/orders-missing-invoices returns count, orders list with order_id, tracking_id, customer_name, has_tracking, has_label

chat_nlp_find_order.details: POST /api/bot/chat correctly parses 'show me order X', 'find order X', 'check order X' as find_order intent

chat_nlp_fix_invoices.details: POST /api/bot/chat correctly parses 'fix invoices', 'show missing invoices', 'orders without invoice' as fix_invoices intent

chat_nlp_status.details: POST /api/bot/chat correctly parses 'status', 'how's everything', 'summary' as status intent

chat_nlp_stuck_orders.details: POST /api/bot/chat correctly parses 'what orders are stuck', 'stuck orders', 'delayed orders' as stuck_orders intent

chat_nlp_production.details: POST /api/bot/chat correctly parses 'production', 'what to make', 'stock levels' as production intent

frontend_window_size.details: Chat window size is 520x600px as specified

frontend_minimize_button.details: Minimize button hides chat and shows 'Chat minimized' label

frontend_reset_button.details: Reset conversation button clears messages and shows welcome message

frontend_quick_action_buttons.details: 6 quick action buttons displayed: Find Order, Status, Stuck Orders, Missing Invoices, Missing Data, Production

frontend_natural_language.details: Natural language 'show me order X' triggers comprehensive order analysis

frontend_fix_invoices.details: 'Missing Invoices' button shows list of orders missing invoices with details

auth_required.details: All bot endpoints require authentication (admin/accountant role)
